operational_knowledge_units.title: LatticeCodeModel maps lattice codes to StationId values
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The LatticeCodeModel stores lattice codes together with their respective StationId. This table is used as the mapping reference between station identifiers and the lattice code required by Geek.
observed_evidence: Slide text states: 'The LatticeCodeModel stores the lattice codes and their respective StationId.'
Slide title and section identify this as part of the Geek AGV Database.
Visual element is identified as a database schema/reference slide.

relationships.details: Stores the relationship between lattice codes and station identifiers.

operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Geek AGV Database LatticeCodeModel database reference. LatticeCodeModel stores lattice codes and their respective StationId values. Used as a mapping table between StationId and lattice code.

operational_knowledge_units.title: Geek Comm converts robotics StationId requests into required lattice codes
operational_knowledge_units.summary: When tote induction or drop-off occurs, Geek requires the location's lattice code. The Geek Comm module uses the LatticeCodeModel table to convert a StationId from a robotics module request into the lattice code expected by Geek.
observed_evidence: Slide text states: 'When a tote is inducted or dropped off. Geek requires a lattice code of the location.'
Slide text states: 'Geek Comm module uses this table to covert the StationId from robotics module request to the lattice code Geek requires.'

relationships.details: Uses the table as a lookup reference.
Conversion occurs to satisfy Geek location input requirements during tote movements.

operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Geek Comm module uses LatticeCodeModel to convert StationId from robotics module requests into the lattice code required by Geek. This applies when a tote is inducted or dropped off.
